scope: Implementation reflection for local campaign mirror, 16-fps narration atlases, safe audio import, and FFmpeg video validation before branded Pages deployment.

evidence.subject: Focused local regression coverage for campaign state, cross-tab mirror behavior, and narration atlas runtime contracts.
evidence.observation: The focused campaign-mirror and narration-atlas test files passed 5 of 5 tests; the deterministic campaign-state test passed 22 of 22 tests.

evidence.subject: Playwriter browser playtest rendered the branded Cinder Span scenario, decorative concept-art atlas, Korean narration, and local-only synchronization status.
evidence.observation: The local 127.0.0.1 game rendered Abyssal Surge with stage art and a Cinder Warden concept-art narrator sprite; a separate current tab resumed with the status '다른 탭의 로컬 캠페인을 반영했습니다.' after cross-tab synchronization.
evidence.command: Playwriter observe -> start -> boss -> battle -> hunt -> retry -> mirror-resume playtest

evidence.subject: All shipped stage videos satisfy the local web-video validation gate.
evidence.observation: Cinder Span, Veil Citadel, and Echo Throne are H.264/yuv420p, 960x540, 24fps, five-second, faststart, and decode-valid. A Cinder opt-in CRF24 candidate preserved SSIM 0.997974 while saving 2,553 bytes; production video remained unchanged pending visual approval.

evidence.subject: The product identity is rebranded in the static client, but the requested public Pages identity is not yet verified as deployed.
evidence.observation: The decision record identifies repository/Pages rename and deployment as an external release action; no deployed branded URL evidence exists yet.

findings.statement: Local implementation and browser evidence exist, but the requested Abyssal-Surge Pages URL has not been verified after repository identity cutover and deployment.

corrective_actions.action: Rename the repository and Pages identity to Abyssal-Surge, publish the verified static artifact, then capture the branded public URL through Playwriter.
corrective_actions.acceptance: https://jellyggumi.github.io/Abyssal-Surge/ serves the Abyssal Surge title and the new assets without console errors.

next_stage_decision.rationale: The production artifacts are locally validated; deployment identity and public browser proof remain a release-blocking corrective action.
